overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through rural countryside. The character moves steadily from a railroad crossing along dirt paths and onto gravel railroad beds, with rolling green hills and scattered trees in the background during early morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural railroad crossing with dirt path

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking forward along the dirt path
distant rider on horseback moves out of view

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily away from the railroad crossing along the dirt trail

notable_agents.action: silhouetted rider on horseback moving away along the path ahead

entered.detail: rusted steel tracks crossing horizontally at the starting position
muddy trail leading through tall grass countryside
rolling hills covered in tall green grass
rolling hills covered in tall green grass
large deciduous tree with dense green foliage
wooden telegraph pole with crossbar and wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rural railroad crossing with the character standing on a dirt path. As the character begins walking, a distant rider on horseback is visible ahead but soon disappears from view. The surroundings consist of open grasslands with scattered oak trees and rolling hills under a clear morning sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing steady walk along the dirt path through open grassland

entered.detail: small wooden structure visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open countryside with the railroad tracks now behind. The dirt path continues through tall grass fields with a distant farmhouse becoming visible on the horizon. The landscape remains consistent with rolling green hills and scattered trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad track bed with gravel ballast

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to rocky gravel railroad bed

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel ballast beside curving railroad tracks

entered.detail: curving steel rails on raised gravel bed
rocky ballast stones surrounding the tracks
tall wooden water tower with conical roof

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a gravel railroad bed, walking alongside curving tracks. A wooden water tower becomes prominent in the distance as the path follows the railway curve through the continued grassland landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural countryside that transitions from an open dirt path to a gravel railroad bed. It begins at a railroad crossing where the character starts walking through open grasslands and rolling hills, briefly spotting a distant rider who soon vanishes from view. As the character moves further into the countryside, the tracks fall behind and the path leads through tall grass fields toward a farmhouse appearing on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto a gravel railroad bed, following the curve of the tracks through the greenery. Finally, the camera tracks along the railway as a wooden water tower becomes prominent in the distance under the clear morning sky.
